brief_justification: Correct answer (Yes) with valid coordinate tracking; Multi-level analysis using fixed coordinate frame with step-by-step position and heading tracking; Some self-monitoring via the reasoning context injections (coordinate anchoring, suppress frame drift) but no explicit mid-analysis reflection; Basic verification through the coordinate table showing return to (0,0) but no counterfactual or alternative verification; Presents conclusion as certain with no uncertainty acknowledgment; No alternative approaches considered (e.g., vector addition or different starting direction); Full audit trail with every step showing action, facing direction, and position — fully reproducible
